# Dragonglass

> Dragonglass is an HTML5-first, pure CSS framework for semantic app interfaces, compiled color themes and focused utility classes.

Use native HTML behavior first. Add Dragonglass component attributes for documented component contracts and utility classes only for focused visual adjustments. Load the core stylesheet and exactly one theme stylesheet.

## Getting started

- [Home](./index.html.md): Learn how Dragonglass styles semantic HTML and where to find each component.
- [App components](./app-components.html.md): Compose common application surfaces from semantic HTML.

## Foundations

- [Layout](./layout.html.md): Build responsive page structures with Dragonglass layout primitives.

## Actions

- [Buttons](./buttons.html.md): Present primary, secondary and floating actions with buttons.
- [Chips](./chips.html.md): Represent compact values, filters and selections with chips.

## Forms

- [Forms](./forms.html.md): Collect information with semantic, accessible form controls.

## Navigation

- [Toolbars](./toolbars.html.md): Group navigation, titles and actions in adaptable toolbars.
- [Expansion panels](./expansion-panels.html.md): Reveal optional content in compact expansion panels.
- [Steppers](./steppers.html.md): Guide people through ordered, multi-step tasks.
- [Tabs](./tabs.html.md): Switch between related sections with accessible tabs.
- [Menus](./menus.html.md): Offer compact groups of navigation links and actions.

## Feedback

- [Alerts](./alerts.html.md): Communicate important status and guidance with alerts.
- [Notifications](./notifications.html.md): Deliver timely, contextual messages with notifications.
- [Progress](./progress.html.md): Show determinate and indeterminate progress states.

## Surfaces

- [Bottom sheets](./bottom-sheets.html.md): Show contextual actions and content in bottom sheets.
- [Cards](./cards.html.md): Group related content and actions in flexible cards.
- [Dialogs](./dialogs.html.md): Focus attention on decisions and short tasks with dialogs.

## Data display

- [Badges](./badges.html.md): Highlight compact statuses, counts and labels with badges.
- [Lists](./lists.html.md): Display related items, details and actions in structured lists.
- [Tables](./tables.html.md): Present structured data in responsive tables.
- [Tooltips](./tooltips.html.md): Add concise supporting context with tooltips.

## Utilities

- [Grid](./grid.html.md): Arrange content with the responsive grid system.
- [Utilities](./utilities.html.md): Compose focused spacing, layout, border, typography, elevation and color adjustments.
- [Elevations](./elevations.html.md): Apply consistent depth and emphasis with elevation utilities.
- [Colors](./colors.html.md): Use the color palette for backgrounds, borders and text.
- [Fonts](./fonts.html.md): Set readable type sizes, weights and styles.

## Optional

- [Default theme](./themes/default.html.md): Preview the Default theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Indigo theme](./themes/indigo.html.md): Preview the Indigo theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Violet theme](./themes/violet.html.md): Preview the Violet theme across semantic colors and common components.

- [Ruby theme](./themes/ruby.html.md): Preview the Ruby theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Amber theme](./themes/amber.html.md): Preview the Amber theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Moss theme](./themes/moss.html.md): Preview the Moss theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Emerald theme](./themes/emerald.html.md): Preview the Emerald theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Teal theme](./themes/teal.html.md): Preview the Teal theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Ocean theme](./themes/ocean.html.md): Preview the Ocean theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Graphite theme](./themes/graphite.html.md): Preview the Graphite theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Stone theme](./themes/stone.html.md): Preview the Stone theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Default dark theme](./themes/dark/default.html.md): Preview the Default dark theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Indigo dark theme](./themes/dark/indigo.html.md): Preview the Indigo dark theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Violet dark theme](./themes/dark/violet.html.md): Preview the Violet dark theme across semantic colors and common components.

- [Ruby dark theme](./themes/dark/ruby.html.md): Preview the Ruby dark theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Amber dark theme](./themes/dark/amber.html.md): Preview the Amber dark theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Moss dark theme](./themes/dark/moss.html.md): Preview the Moss dark theme across semantic colors and common components.

- [Ocean dark theme](./themes/dark/ocean.html.md): Preview the Ocean dark theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Graphite dark theme](./themes/dark/graphite.html.md): Preview the Graphite dark theme across semantic colors and common components.
- [Stone dark theme](./themes/dark/stone.html.md): Preview the Stone dark theme across semantic colors and common components.
